'''Gam Tim'nisi asteroid belt''' was an asteroid belt in the [[Tungra sector/Legends|Tungra sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|The galaxy]], not far from the [[Bespin system/Legends|Bespin system]].

[[Shusko Station]], a profitable mining operation, was located there.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (video game)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']] {{1st}}
